linting.notes: No linter configuration found. Repository contains only shell scripts and a Dockerfile. No Python source code to lint. Shellcheck could be used but is not configured.

testing.notes: No test infrastructure exists. This is a container image repository with no application code or tests.

gating_checks.name: thoth-build
gating_checks.command: Container build via AICoE CI - builds Dockerfile and pushes to quay.io/thoth-station/s2i-lab-elyra

ci.notes: No GitHub Actions workflows. CI is handled entirely by AICoE CI system (Thoth Station). The only check is building the container image. Repository is archived/read-only.

build.build_command: podman build -t s2i-lab-elyra:latest . OR docker build -t s2i-lab-elyra:latest .
build.notes: Container-only build. Base image: quay.io/thoth-station/s2i-minimal-py38-notebook:v0.5.0. Installs elyra[kfp-tekton]==3.12.0. No application build step beyond container creation.

conventions.notes: No code conventions applicable - repository contains only configuration files and shell scripts for container initialization.

setup_commands: # No setup needed - repository has no tests or linting to run
# The only validation possible is syntax checking shell scripts
container_recipe.notes: This repository has no lint or test infrastructure. Container validation attempted only basic syntax checks. Shell scripts validated with 'bash -n' successfully. Requirements.txt is syntactically valid. Full container build not attempted as it requires Thoth Station base image.

results.notes: Both shell scripts have valid bash syntax
requirements.txt is readable and contains: elyra[kfp-tekton]==3.12.0

validation.summary: No tests or linting configured. Only validated shell script syntax (PASS) and requirements.txt parsing (OK). Repository is archived and contains no application code.
